metaData.Ingredients: Liver, Meat Broth, Meat By-products, Chicken, Artificial and Natural Flavours, Calcium Phosphate, Guar Gum, Potassium Chloride, Taurine, Salt, Mangesium Sulphate, Thiamine Mononitrate, Vitamin E Supplement, Zinc Sulphate, Ferrous Sulphate, Niacin, Calcium Pantothenate, Vitamin A Supplement, Copper Sulphate, Manganese Sulphate, Menadione Sodium Bisulphite Complex (Source of Vitamin K Activity), Pyridoxine Hydrochloride, Riboflavin Supplement, Vitamin B-12 Supplement, Biotin, Folic Acid, Vitamin D-3 Supplement, Potassium Iodide
metaData.Key Information: Fancy Feast Classic Tender Liver and Chicken Feast offers a smooth pate made from a combination of liver and chicken feast
metaData.Preparation:
1. Feed an average-sized adult cat 1 can per 1.4 kilograms of body weight daily
2. Feed up to twice this amount to kittens
3. Pregnant or nursing cats may require two to four times their normal feeding

metaData.Preparation:
1. Fill litter tray with Catsan to a depth of 5-6cm
2. On coming into contact with liquid or animal waste, clay will form as well defined clumps
3. Remove the hard clumps
4. No need to discard the remaining sand just top up with fresh Catsan
